title: C'borp

{{Quote|Nice work, C'borp!|Finhead Stonebone|<ref name="nomi2" />}}
'''C'borp''' was [[Finhead Stonebone]]'s chief [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]] aboard the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] ''[[Marauder Starjacker]]''. In [[3999 BBY]], C'borp used the ship's [[Laser/Legends|laser]] [[Autoturret/Legends|turret]] to fire on an [[Ithullan ore hauler|Ithullian ore hauler]], which was transporting valuable [[Ore/Legends|ore]] that Stonebone wanted to siphon and was protected by a hired security detail provided by the powerful [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Bogga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. However, as the siphoning crew boarded the [[ore hauler]], Bogga's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Enforcer One (dreadnaught)|''Enforcer One'']], arrived and captured the ''Marauder Starjacker'' and [[Prisoner/Legends|imprisoned]] its crew. 

C'borp and the other pirates were brought to the Hutt's [[Bogga's palace|estate]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Vo Dasha]], where Stonebone and his crew were offered exoneration for their pirating if they went to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ambria/Legends|Ambria]] to retrieve [[Adegan crystal/Legends|Adegan crystals]] for the Hutt. Stonebone agreed, and the group, joined by a [[Bogga's enforcer gang|team]] of Bogga's enforcers, successfully obtained the [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]] on Ambria. However, as the two groups began fighting amongst themselves about who would get the reward, [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi trainee]] [[Nomi Sunrider]] [[Skirmish on Ambria|attacked]] the criminals and [[Death/Legends|killed]] C'borp.

==Biography==
===Attacking an ore hauler===
{{Quote|We hit the last of the escort tacticals, Finhead.|C'borp|<ref name="nomi2" />}}
[[File:Attack_on_the_Ithullian_ore_hauler.png|thumb|right|250px|Dreebo fires on the pirate crew's ore siphoners as they latch on to the Ithullan ore hauler.]]
In [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]], C'borp was the chief [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]] on the ''[[Marauder Starjacker]]'', a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] owned and operated by a man named [[Finhead Stonebone]].<ref name="CSWE" /> In [[3999 BBY]],<ref name="TotJ4 Date">''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Tales of the Jedi Volume 1]]'' dates the events of [[Tales of the Jedi 4|''Tales of the Jedi'' 4]] to [[3999 BBY]].</ref> on the ''Marauder Starjacker'', C'borp took<ref name="nomi2" /> his<ref name="CSWE" /> position at the [[Laser/Legends|laser]] [[Autoturret/Legends|turrets]] to fire on an [[Ithullan ore hauler]] commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gruna]], which contained [[Ore/Legends|ore]] that Stonebone wanted to siphon. The [[ore hauler]] was defended by [[Dreebo]], an [[Bogga's enforcer gang|enforcer]] under the employ of Stonebone's rival, the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Bogga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. Although Dreebo quickly moved to attack the ''Marauder Starjacker'', every shot he fired missed; taking the opportunity, C'borp fired back at Dreebo, destroying the enforcer's [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]].<ref name="nomi2" />

C'borp then turned his attention to the ore hauler, destroying the rest of its defenses and allowing the rest of Stonebone's men to start siphoning the ore. After his attack on the ore hauler, C'borp reported his success to Stonebone, who received him with praise. However, [[Finhead Stonebone's pirate gang|Stonebone's crew]] was surprised by the appearance of the [[Enforcer One (dreadnaught)|''Enforcer One'']], Bogga's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]]. Bogga's enforcers captured the ''Marauder Starjacker'' and took its crew, including C'borp, [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]].<ref name="nomi2" />

===Under Bogga's control===
{{Quote|Hold your fire, men! The ''herd animal's'' ready to surrender and give us the ''crystals!''|Stonebone to C'borp and his crew, on Thon|<ref name="nomi3" />}}
C'borp and his pirate associates were brought to [[Bogga's palace|Bogga's estate]] on the [[Aweris system]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Vo Dasha]] in chains. Although Stonebone's crew were threatened at first, they were offered a chance at exoneration by Bogga if they performed a task for him. The Hutt wanted the group to journey to the desolate [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ambria/Legends|Ambria]] to retrieve a shipment of valuable [[Adegan crystal/Legends|Adegan crystals]] that had eluded his grasp some time prior.<ref name="nomi2" /> Stonebone agreed on behalf of the team, and his associates, including C'borp, went to Ambria alongside several of Bogga's top enforcers. Due to knowledge gained from a previous [[Skirmish on Ambria|excursion]] to Ambria, Bogga and his crew knew that the Adegan [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]] were being kept at [[Ambria Jedi Enclave|the compound]] of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Thon]], Bogga's sworn enemy. Descending out of their [[Skiff/Legends|skiffs]], C'borp and the crew were met by Thon, who did not attack as he was expected to, surprising the pirates. Instead, Thon allowed himself to be taken prisoner by the group.<ref name="nomi3" />

[[File:ThonNomiBattle.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Nomi Sunrider and Thon attack Stonebone and his pirates, including C'borp.]]
However, infighting soon surfaced between Bogga's enforcers and Stonebone's pirates, as the enforcers refused to share the profit from the crystals. The verbal sparring escalated into a brawl between the two sides, with C'borp [[Unarmed combat/Legends|fighting]] [[Fnnbu]], the enforcer who had discovered the crystals in the compound. Little did they know, their violent emotions were being [[Battle meditation/Legends|influenced]] through [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by [[Nomi Sunrider]], a young [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi trainee]] under the [[Jedi training/Legends|tutelage]] of Thon. While the two sides were distracted by the physical confrontation, Sunrider sprang into action, igniting her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and [[Skirmish on Ambria|attacking]] them. C'borp was helpless to stop Sunrider, and was [[Death/Legends|slain]]. Sunrider and Thon were ultimately able to drive them off, and the surviving team members were forced to flee Ambria without the crystals.<ref name="nomi3" />

==Personality and traits==
C'borp had tentacle-like [[Limb/Legends|arms]], [[Color/Legends|orange]] skin,<ref name="nomi3" /> two black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] on his head, and a [[Slug (creature)/Legends|slug]]-like tail. He was willing to perform illegal activities, as he found work as the gunner on Stonebone's pirate vessel and assisted in illegal ore siphoning, taking pride in a job well done. He was also very competent at his job, and found his work met with praise by Stonebone.<ref name="nomi2" /> On Ambria, C'borp was easily influenced by mental [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]], being manipulated by Sunrider to behave violently.<ref name="nomi3" />

==Skills and abilities==
C'borp manned a gunner's station on the ''Maurader Starjacker'' and used it to successfully attack an Ithullan ore hauler.<ref name="nomi2" /> He was capable enough in hand-to-hand combat to take on the Hutt enforcer Fnnbu, but was quickly killed by Jedi trainee Nomi Sunrider with her lightsaber when she attacked.<ref name="nomi3" />

==Equipment==
C'borp wore a brown [[Clothing/Legends|tunic]] with brown [[Pauldron/Legends|pauldrons]] on both shoulders.<ref name="nomi3" />

==Behind the scenes==
C'borp first appeared in in the [[Tales of the Jedi 4|fourth issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Tales of the Jedi'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series, which was written by [[Tom Veitch]], illustrated by [[David Roach]], and published by [[Dark Horse Comics]]<ref name="nomi2" /> on [[January 18]], [[1994]].<ref name="DarkHorse">{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/93-141/Star-Wars-Tales-of-the-Jedi-4-of-5|text=Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi 4}}</ref>
